feed.title: ts_jewess
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from ts_jewess

entry.title: Starting a tiktok cuz im a comedian now!!! #comedy #transgirl #transgirlcomedy #jew #jewishgirl #trans #queer #hebrewschool #hebrewschoolcomedy #jewishcomedy #fyp #foryoupage

entry.title: Shout out to all the bagel chasers out there!! Thanks @10.forward and @menschorama for inviting me to do a show up in the Borscht Belt! #comedy #comedyvideos #brooklyncomedy #borschtbelt #massachusetscomedy #greenfield #westernmass #transcomedy #transgirl
entry.content: Shout out to all the bagel chasers out there!! Thanks @10.forward and @menschorama for inviting me to do a show up in the Borscht Belt! #comedy #comedyvideos #brooklyncomedy #borschtbelt #massachusetscomedy #greenfield #westernmass #transcomedy #transgirl

entry.title: Hello Tiktok!!! If you missed my last borscht belt show never fear bc I have another borscht belt show coming up!! Far Out Comedy Fest in Greenfield, MA on 8/26 get your tickets!!! #comedy #comedyvideos #brooklyncomedy #berkeley #transcomedy #transgirlc
entry.content: Hello Tiktok!!! If you missed my last borscht belt show never fear bc I have another borscht belt show coming up!! Far Out Comedy Fest in Greenfield, MA on 8/26 get your tickets!!! #comedy #comedyvideos #brooklyncomedy #berkeley #transcomedy #transgirlc

entry.title: GET YOUR TICKETS TO THE DEBUT OF TRANS AGENDA COMEDY — LINK IN BIO!!! Hosted by me and @Hero of Slime , Trans Agenda Comedy features six incredible trans comedians and an after party at a TOP SECRET VENUE!! Come through!!!!
